name: METLIFE INC
business: MetLife is one of the world's leading financial services companies, providing insurance, annuities, employee benefits and asset management.
sellsTo: Corporations and other institutions (including local, state and federal governments) and their respective employees

exposures.sentence: As used in this Form 10-K, MetLife, the Company, we, our and us refer to MetLife, Inc., a Delaware corporation incorporated in 1999, its subsidiaries and affiliates. MetLife is one of the world s leading financial services companies, providing insurance, annuities, employee benefits and asset management.

catalysts.event: Achieve direct expense ratio target of 12.1% for 2026
catalysts.sentence: Based on our continued focus on expense discipline and our overall efficiency mindset, we are committed to achieving a direct expense ratio target, excluding total notable items related to direct expenses and pension risk transfers, of (i) 12.1% for 2026 and (ii) 11.3% in 2029.

catalysts.event: Achieve direct expense ratio target of 11.3% in 2029
catalysts.sentence: Based on our continued focus on expense discipline and our overall efficiency mindset, we are committed to achieving a direct expense ratio target, excluding total notable items related to direct expenses and pension risk transfers, of (i) 12.1% for 2026 and (ii) 11.3% in 2029.

catalysts.event: Generate approximately $25.0 billion in free cash flow over the five-year period 2025 to 2029
catalysts.sentence: We also returned a total of approximately $4.4 billion to shareholders in 2025, and we remain on track to generate approximately $25.0 billion in free cash flow over the five-year period of 2025 to 2029.
